members.name: _ProcessAnimationNode
members.summary: A version of the [method AnimationNode._process] method that is meant to be overridden by custom nodes. It returns a [PackedFloat32Array] with the processed animation data. The [PackedFloat64Array] parameter contains the playback information, containing the following values encoded as floating point numbers (in order): playback time and delta, start and end times, whether a seek was requested (encoded as a float greater than [code]0[/code]), whether the seek request was externally requested (encoded as a float greater than [code]0[/code]), the current [enum Animation.LoopedFlag] (encoded as a float), and the current blend weight. The function must return a [PackedFloat32Array] of the node's time info, containing the following values (in order): animation length, time position, delta, [enum Animation.LoopMode] (encoded as a float), whether the animation is about to end (encoded as a float greater than [code]0[/code]) and whether the animation is infinite (encoded as a float greater than [code]0[/code]). All values must be included in the returned array.

members.name: GetRemainingTime
members.signature: public float GetRemainingTime(PackedFloat32Array nodeInfo, bool breakLoop)
members.summary: Returns the animation's remaining time for the given node info. For looping animations, it will only return the remaining time if [param break_loop] is [code]true[/code], a large integer value will be returned otherwise.

members.name: IsLooping
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the animation for the given [param node_info] is looping.
